cache-clear-initial.script:
report() {
  printf '%s\n' "$1" >> reports/cache-clear-initial.log
}

mkdir -p reports cached
rm -rf cached/*
report 'cleared-initial'
if [ -e cached/payload.txt ]; then
  echo '[ERROR] payload should not exist after initial clear'
  exit 1
fi

cache-produce-payload.script:
report() {
  printf '%s\n' "$1" >> reports/cache-produce-payload.log
}

mkdir -p reports cached
cat > cached/payload.txt <<EOF
produced-by=$CI_JOB_NAME
cache-key=flow-cache-roundtrip
EOF
report 'payload-created'
report "payload=$(tr '\n' ';' < cached/payload.txt)"

cache-inspect-empty.script:
report() {
  printf '%s\n' "$1" >> reports/cache-inspect-empty.log
}

mkdir -p reports cached
if [ -e cached/payload.txt ]; then
  echo '[ERROR] cache payload should have been removed'
  exit 1
fi
report 'cache-empty'
